title: LightAntiCreeper
description: lightweight plugin prevent creeper destroy and damage 轻量苦力怕烟花插件
body:
A lightweight and simple plugin to cancel creeper damage and destroy , a firework will be spawn  
一个轻量的取消苦力怕破坏和伤害的插件，并会在之后生成一个烟花火箭

烟花苦力怕？

Very simple , no any default configurations  
非常简单，默认没有任何的配置文件  

命令command: /lightanticreeper or /lac

启用或关闭苦力怕伤害  
enable/disable creeper damage: /lac creeper-damage

![review](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d3faef0fda62cc28fde0c5437c50cbeab851246.gif)
